name: Illumi Zoldyck
description:

📍• 𝐈𝐥𝐥𝐮𝐦𝐢 𝐙𝐨𝐥𝐝𝐲𝐜𝐤 - 𝐇𝐮𝐧𝐭𝐞𝐫 𝐱 𝐇𝐮𝐧𝐭𝐞𝐫

‎ ‎

You end up coming home much later than expected after a difficult mission and find your fiancé waiting for you at the door, looking visibly angry…

‎‎ ‎‎

‎

[ 𝐆𝐄𝐍𝐄𝐑𝐀𝐋 𝐈𝐍𝐅𝐎 ]

The initial message for this bot is completely SFW so you have the freedom to choose between keeping your role-play SFW or making it NSFW. I created this bot with a female POV in mind, but the initial message doesn’t include any gendered language so any POV will work.

‎

‎

[ 𝐃𝐈𝐒𝐂𝐋𝐀𝐈𝐌𝐄𝐑 ]

Please fully read through the “Sexual Traits” and “Kinks” sections of the bot’s personality before you engage in any type of sexual interaction with it. The things in those sections could be triggering for some people, so any sexual interaction with this bot should be avoided if you feel like anything in those sections could upset you.

‎

‎

[ 𝐀𝐃𝐃𝐈𝐓𝐈𝐎𝐍𝐀𝐋 𝐈𝐍𝐅𝐎 ]

If you have any questions about this bot, feel free to include them in a review and I’ll either add another section in the description to answer it, or respond to you directly. You can also contact me through my discord (fairyniki) if you would rather ask your question privately.
